task_description: Upgrade Khmer Store from V2 to V3: replace complex e-commerce schema with simplified marketplace-listings model, fix auth to work with Supabase (signup, login, OAuth, password reset), build beautiful modern frontend with real data from Supabase, add full admin panel for managing users/listings/categories/reports, and ensure all pages use real database data with proper empty states.

verification.summary: Build passes cleanly with 24 routes (15 static + 6 dynamic + auth callback + admin dynamic). 0 lint errors, 2 acceptable warnings (img elements used for blob URL previews). All routes compile without TypeScript errors.
